'''chobachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oaky|oaky]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oaky|oaky]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chobachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobachithi|chobachithi]] || [[word:chobachiji|chobachiji]] || [[word:chobachishi|chobachishi]] || [[word:chobachiki|chobachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobachuthuthu|chobachuthuthu]] || [[word:chobachujuju|chobachujuju]] || [[word:chobachushushu|chobachushushu]] || [[word:chobachukuku|chobachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobachuthu|chobachuthu]] || [[word:chobachuju|chobachuju]] || [[word:chobachushu|chobachushu]] || [[word:chobachuku|chobachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobachufthuf|chobachufthuf]] || [[word:chobachufjuf|chobachufjuf]] || [[word:chobachufshuf|chobachufshuf]] || [[word:chobachufkuf|chobachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobachethe|chobachethe]] || [[word:chobacheje|chobacheje]] || [[word:chobacheshe|chobacheshe]] || [[word:chobacheke|chobacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobachothotho|chobachothotho]] || [[word:chobachojojo|chobachojojo]] || [[word:chobachoshosho|chobachoshosho]] || [[word:chobachokoko|chobachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobachotho|chobachotho]] || [[word:chobachojo|chobachojo]] || [[word:chobachosho|chobachosho]] || [[word:chobachoko|chobachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobachofthof|chobachofthof]] || [[word:chobachofjof|chobachofjof]] || [[word:chobachofshof|chobachofshof]] || [[word:chobachofkof|chobachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfthĂŻf|chobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfjĂŻf|chobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfshĂŻf|chobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfkĂŻf|chobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chobachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chobachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chobachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chobachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfthĂŻf|chobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfjĂŻf|chobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfshĂŻf|chobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfkĂŻf|chobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfthĂŻf|chobachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfjĂŻf|chobachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfshĂŻf|chobachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobachĂŻfkĂŻf|chobachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobachĂŠthĂŠ|chobachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chobachĂŠjĂŠ|chobachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chobachĂŠshĂŠ|chobachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chobachĂŠkĂŠ|chobachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobachathatha|chobachathatha]] || [[word:chobachajaja|chobachajaja]] || [[word:chobachashasha|chobachashasha]] || [[word:chobachakaka|chobachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobachatha|chobachatha]] || [[word:chobachaja|chobachaja]] || [[word:chobachasha|chobachasha]] || [[word:chobachaka|chobachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobachafthaf|chobachafthaf]] || [[word:chobachafjaf|chobachafjaf]] || [[word:chobachafshaf|chobachafshaf]] || [[word:chobachafkaf|chobachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chobachasha|chobachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chobachshĂ«sha|chobachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chobachrosha|chobachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chobachmusha|chobachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chobachyasha|chobachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochobachnkshĂ«sha|gochobachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochobachnkrosha|gochobachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochobachnkmusha|gochobachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochobachnkyasha|gochobachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chobabachasha|chobabachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chobabachshĂ«sha|chobabachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chobabachrosha|chobabachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chobabachmusha|chobabachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chobabachyasha|chobabachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochobabachnkshĂ«sha|gochobabachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochobabachnkrosha|gochobabachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochobabachnkmusha|gochobabachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochobabachnkyasha|gochobabachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chebĂŠchasha|chebĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chebĂŠchshĂ«sha|chebĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chebĂŠchrosha|chebĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chebĂŠchmusha|chebĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chebĂŠchyasha|chebĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochebĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gochebĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochebĂŠchnkrosha|gochebĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochebĂŠchnkmusha|gochebĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochebĂŠchnkyasha|gochebĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chobfachasha|chobfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chobfachshĂ«sha|chobfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chobfachrosha|chobfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chobfachmusha|chobfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chobfachyasha|chobfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochobfachnkshĂ«sha|gochobfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochobfachnkrosha|gochobfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochobfachnkmusha|gochobfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochobfachnkyasha|gochobfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
